requirement_topic.en: EDG Grid Connection for BESS — 220/380 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EDG BESS并网——220/380 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: EDG BESS併網——220/380 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: EDG (Electricité de Guinée) is the national electricity utility and primary grid operator in Guinea, responsible for generation, transmission, and distribution. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale solar-hybrid projects and behind-the-meter industrial systems — require EDG technical review and grid-connection approval. Guinea's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase — nominally identical to China's domestic grid voltage, which reduces PCS voltage reconfiguration risk compared with markets using 240/415 V. EDG has been developing grid capacity through major hydropower projects including Souapiti (450 MW, commissioned 2021) and Kaleta (240 MW). BESS deployments in Guinea are predominantly in solar-hybrid mini-grid, off-grid mine, and donor-financed rural electrification contexts where EDG or project-owner specifications govern. No publicly accessible EDG technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from EDG. Donor-financed projects (World Bank, AfDB, IFC) typically impose IEC 62933 series requirements (IEC 62933-2-1 unit parameters, IEC 62933-5-2 safety) on BESS systems.
summary.zh: EDG（几内亚电力公司）是几内亚国家电力公司和主要电网运营商，负责发电、输电和配电。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模太阳能混合项目和表后工业系统——均须取得EDG技术审查和并网批准。几内亚电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相220 V、三相380 V——与中国国内电网电压名义上一致，与采用240/415 V的市场相比降低了储能变流器电压重新配置的风险。EDG通过重大水电项目持续扩大电网容量，包括苏阿皮蒂水电站（450 MW，2021年投运）和卡莱塔水电站（240 MW）。几内亚的BESS部署主要集中于太阳能混合微电网、离网矿山及捐助方资助的农村电气化背景下，适用EDG或项目业主规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认EDG公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向EDG获取。捐助方资助项目（世界银行、非开行、IFC）通常对BESS系统施加IEC 62933系列要求（IEC 62933-2-1单元参数、IEC 62933-5-2安全）。
summary.zht: EDG（幾內亞電力公司）是幾內亞國家電力公司和主要電網運營商，負責發電、輸電和配電。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模太陽能混合項目和表後工業系統——均須取得EDG技術審查和併網批准。幾內亞電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相220 V、三相380 V——與中國國內電網電壓名義上一致，與採用240/415 V的市場相比降低了儲能變流器電壓重新配置的風險。EDG通過重大水電項目持續擴大電網容量，包括蘇阿皮蒂水電站（450 MW，2021年投運）和卡萊塔水電站（240 MW）。幾內亞的BESS部署主要集中於太陽能混合微電網、離網礦山及捐助方資助的農村電氣化背景下，適用EDG或項目業主規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認EDG公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向EDG獲取。捐助方資助項目（世界銀行、非開行、IFC）通常對BESS系統施加IEC 62933系列要求（IEC 62933-2-1單元參數、IEC 62933-5-2安全）。

standards_or_laws: EDG (Electricité de Guinée) — grid-connection authority; no publicly confirmed BESS-specific technical specification as of dataset date — engage EDG directly
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (referenced in donor-financed project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (referenced in donor-financed project specifications)
Guinea grid parameters: 50 Hz, 220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase (nominally aligned with China domestic grid)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V — nominally identical to Guinea's grid voltage, which means PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings require less reconfiguration than for higher-voltage markets. However, Chinese GB/T certifications and NEA grid-operator approvals are not transferable to EDG and are not accepted by donor-financed project specifications as equivalent to IEC 62933.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V——与几内亚电网电压名义上一致，意味着储能变流器电压保护阈值和穿越参数比高电压市场需要的重新配置更少。然而，中国GB/T认证和NEA电网运营商审批不可转用至EDG，不被捐助方资助项目规格接受为等同于IEC 62933的依据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V——與幾內亞電網電壓名義上一致，意味著儲能變流器電壓保護閾值和穿越參數比高電壓市場需要的重新配置更少。然而，中國GB/T認證和NEA電網運營商審批不可轉用至EDG，不被捐助方資助項目規格接受為等同於IEC 62933的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy EDG's grid-connection requirements and are not accepted by donor-financed project specifications. Key considerations: (a) voltage alignment — Guinea and China share the same nominal 220/380 V 50 Hz grid parameters, which is a practical advantage over markets using 240/415 V; however, EDG's specific voltage tolerance bands, frequency range, and protection relay settings must be confirmed directly with EDG; (b) EDG project-specific connection agreement terms — engage EDG at the earliest project stage to obtain technical requirements before equipment design is finalised, noting that no public BESS-specific EDG technical specification has been confirmed; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — donor-financed projects (World Bank, AfDB, IFC) typically require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) communication protocols — confirm SCADA/communication interface protocol required by EDG or project specification for BESS monitoring; (e) humidity and temperature derating — Guinea's tropical coastal climate (Conakry mean humidity >80%) imposes environmental stresses on BESS electronics that must be addressed in system thermal design and derating calculations.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足EDG并网要求，不被捐助方资助项目规格接受。关键考量：（a）电压一致性——几内亚与中国共享相同的名义220/380 V 50 Hz电网参数，相比240/415 V市场具有实际优势；然而，EDG的具体电压容差带、频率范围和保护继电器设置须直接向EDG确认；（b）EDG项目专属并网协议条款——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与EDG接触获取技术要求，注意尚无经确认的EDG公开BESS专项技术规格；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——捐助方资助项目（世界银行、非开行、IFC）通常要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）通信协议——确认EDG或项目规格对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议；（e）湿度和温度降额——几内亚热带沿海气候（科纳克里平均湿度>80%）对BESS电子设备造成须在系统热设计和降额计算中加以应对的环境应力。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足EDG併網要求，不被捐助方資助項目規格接受。關鍵考量：（a）電壓一致性——幾內亞與中國共享相同的名義220/380 V 50 Hz電網參數，相比240/415 V市場具有實際優勢；然而，EDG的具體電壓容差帶、頻率範圍和保護繼電器設置須直接向EDG確認；（b）EDG項目專屬併網協議條款——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與EDG接觸獲取技術要求，注意尚無經確認的EDG公開BESS專項技術規格；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——捐助方資助項目（世界銀行、非開行、IFC）通常要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）通訊協議——確認EDG或項目規格對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議；（e）濕度和溫度降額——幾內亞熱帶沿海氣候（科納克里平均濕度>80%）對BESS電子設備造成須在系統熱設計和降額計算中加以應對的環境應力。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EDG grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Guinea; technical requirements are project-specific and must be confirmed directly with EDG; no publicly confirmed BESS-specific EDG technical specification as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Guinea or accepted by donor-financed project specifications

source.publisher: EDG (Electricité de Guinée) — Guinea national electricity utility (engage EDG directly for technical specifications)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy EDG's Guinea grid-connection requirements and are not accepted by donor-financed project specifications. Guinea and China share the same nominal 220/380 V 50 Hz grid voltage, which is a practical advantage, but EDG-specific protection settings, voltage tolerance bands, and communication protocol requirements must be confirmed directly with EDG before equipment design is finalised. Donor-financed projects require IEC 62933 series evidence. No publicly accessible EDG BESS-specific technical specification has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct EDG engagement is essential before equipment procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足EDG几内亚并网要求，不被捐助方资助项目规格接受。几内亚与中国共享相同的名义220/380 V 50 Hz电网电压，具有实际优势，但EDG专属保护设置、电压容差带和通信协议要求须在设备设计最终确定前直接向EDG确认。捐助方资助项目要求IEC 62933系列证据。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认EDG公开发布BESS专项技术规格——在设备采购前直接与EDG接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足EDG幾內亞併網要求，不被捐助方資助項目規格接受。幾內亞與中國共享相同的名義220/380 V 50 Hz電網電壓，具有實際優勢，但EDG專屬保護設置、電壓容差帶和通訊協議要求須在設備設計最終確定前直接向EDG確認。捐助方資助項目要求IEC 62933系列證據。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認EDG公開發布BESS專項技術規格——在設備採購前直接與EDG接觸至關重要。
